row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward movement along a straight road with slight curvature to the right.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Red bounding boxes indicate static or slow-moving objects on the roadside and curbs; no dynamic vehicle trajectories are prominent.

semantic.scene_summary: A daytime urban street scene with modern buildings, trees, and paved roads. The view includes multiple camera angles stitched together showing a continuous forward path.
semantic.visibility_notes: All elements are clearly visible with natural lighting and sharp detail. No occlusions obscure critical traffic features.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression across frames with consistent perspective changes. Objects maintain stable positions relative to ego motion.
logical.object_continuity: Static objects (buildings, trees, signs) remain consistently positioned without sudden jumps or disappearances.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and building structures align continuously across frames without warping or structural breaks.

decision.ego_behavior_description: The ego vehicle moves steadily forward along the road, maintaining lane position.
decision.risk_context: No immediate hazards or risky interactions are visible. Road ahead is clear for continued forward travel.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban street scene as Row 1 but with noticeable blurring and reduced clarity. Buildings, trees, and road elements are present but less defined.
key_objects: Paved road with faint lane markings
semantic.visibility_notes: Significant blur reduces visibility of fine details. Traffic elements are present but harder to interpret due to loss of sharpness.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Forward motion appears smooth but with temporal instability—objects exhibit slight flickering or ghosting effects between frames.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames but show minor positional drift or morphing artifacts, especially near edges of frames.
logical.structure_continuity: Overall structure remains coherent but exhibits subtle warping and softening of architectural lines and road boundaries.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward at similar speed, though visual degradation may affect precise navigation.
decision.risk_context: Reduced scene readability could impair downstream decision-making; no explicit risk event is visible, but confidence in hazard detection is lowered.

missing_or_weakened_elements: Detail in building textures and windows
artifacts_or_instabilities: Ghosting around moving or edge objects
Overall image blur reducing semantic clarity
